12.reason: This line attempts to redirect stdin from a file "out.txt". If the file does not exist or cannot be opened, subsequent scanf calls will fail, leaving variables uninitialized, leading to garbage output.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  This line attempts to redirect stdin from a file "out.txt". If the file does not exist or cannot be opened, subsequent scanf calls will fail, leaving variables uninitialized, leading to garbage output.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Incorrect file redirection; reads from "out.txt" instead of standard input, causing no input to be read. Should be removed or changed to read from the actual input file.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The input should be read from standard input, not from a file named "out.txt". This causes the program to fail to read the test case input correctly, leading to uninitialized variables and wrong output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The input should be read from standard input, not a file. This causes the program to fail to read the test case input correctly, leading to uninitialized variables and wrong output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [This redirects stdin to read from "out.txt", but the problem expects input from standard input. This causes the program to fail when run in a normal environment without that file.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This redirects stdin to read from "out.txt", but the problem expects input from standard input. This causes the program to fail when run normally without the file.]

272.reason: [Freeing memory while still using 'q' which points to freed memory leads to undefined behavior. Also, after freeing 'p', 'q' becomes invalid if it was pointing to the same node.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Freeing memory while still using 'q' which points to freed memory leads to undefined behavior. Also, after freeing 'p', 'q' becomes invalid if it was pointing to the same node.]

278.reason: [Same issue: freeing 'p' while 'q' may still be used in next iteration. This corrupts the linked list traversal and causes use-after-free.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Same issue: freeing 'p' while 'q' may still be used in next iteration. This corrupts the linked list traversal and causes use-after-free.]
